final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign with a complex but visually organized composition.

Style/medium: needs a "跨境电商促销" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Saul Bass commercial poster typography, 2000s Y2K e-commerce visual language, contemporary 天猫/京东 大促 key visual design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include typographic stacking (layered font hierarchy), with a product or hero subject physically overlapping and partially obscuring background lettering; overall layout must feel rich and complex but not chaotic
Subject: must include a prominent product or hero subject as the focal element that overlaps the text layers
Scene/backdrop: needs a dynamic promotional backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy, attention-grabbing promotional mood — exact lighting is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, vibrant promotional color palette — exact hues are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include decorative art typography (艺术字) as a design element; exact copy is yours
Constraints: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; typographic stacking must be visible as a deliberate design layer; product/subject overlap with lettering must be clearly executed
Avoid: cluttered or disorganized layouts; flat or monotonous compositions
